SELECT '<='(string_value, 'aa') AS comparison_result FROM test_data WHERE string_value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT string_value, '<='(string_value, 'ad') AS comparison_result FROM test_data WHERE '<='(string_value, 'ab');
SELECT a.string_value, b.numeric_value FROM test_data a JOIN additional_data b ON '<='(a.string_value, 'ab') AND b.numeric_value <= 2;
SELECT '<='(t1.string_value, t2.string_value) AS comparison_result FROM test_data t1, test_data t2 WHERE t1.string_value <> t2.string_value;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_data WHERE '<='(string_value, (SELECT MAX(string_value) FROM test_data));
